metadata.description: Give Claude new tools just by asking. API keys stay in your vault (never in config or chat), new tools get safety-checked, and it all runs locally with no cloud and no Docker. Always-on team tools are set up through the same plain-language flow.

plugins.name: mcp-secure
plugins.description: Add tools to Claude in plain language. Keys stay in your vault (never in config or chat), new tools are safety-checked, and you're warned if one changes later. Runs locally, no cloud. Start with /mcp-secure:setup.
